title: Complete a checkout submission
description: A customer can fill the required checkout information and submit the order form to continue the purchase flow.

steps.description: Navigate to /checkout
Fill in the required checkout information fields with valid details
Submit the checkout form
Verify a checkout confirmation is visible
Verify the order submission result is displayed

title: Submit the checkout form
description: This verifies that a customer can complete the checkout form and submit an order from the checkout page.

steps.description: Navigate to /checkout
Fill in a valid name
Fill in a valid shipping address
Fill in a valid contact email
Fill in a valid phone number
Submit the checkout form
Verify an order confirmation is visible

title: Send a contact inquiry
description: A visitor can open the contact page, complete the inquiry form, and see confirmation that the message was sent.

steps.description: Navigate to /contact
Fill in the contact form with valid inquiry details
Submit the contact form
Verify a message sent confirmation is visible
Verify the contact submission result is displayed

title: Submit a contact inquiry
description: This verifies that a visitor can complete and submit the contact form and see a confirmation that the message was sent.

steps.description: Navigate to /contact
Fill in a valid name
Fill in a valid email address
Fill in a valid message
Submit the contact form
Verify a message sent confirmation is visible

title: Proceed from cart to checkout
description: A customer with cart intent can open the cart and continue into the checkout page for purchase entry.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click the link to open the cart
Click the link to proceed to checkout
Verify the checkout page is displayed
Verify the checkout information form is displayed

title: Browse homepage featured storefront content
description: This verifies that a shopper can land on the homepage and see the key featured shopping and brand content that the storefront is meant to showcase.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Verify featured product promotions are displayed
Verify best sellers and customer reviews are displayed

title: Open cart from the homepage
description: A shopper can move from the homepage to the cart page and view the cart area through normal browsing.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click the link to open the cart
Verify the cart page is displayed
Verify the cart contents area is displayed

title: Open the contact page from public navigation
description: This verifies that a visitor can navigate to the contact page and reach the inquiry form through normal browsing.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click the link to view the contact page
Verify the contact form is displayed

title: Open a public page from the homepage
description: This verifies that a visitor can move from the homepage to another public page through normal browsing and reach the destination successfully.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click the link to view the about page
Verify the about page is displayed

title: Browse the homepage and open About
description: A shopper can land on the homepage, explore the boutique landing content, and navigate to the About page through the client-side transition.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click the link to open the About page
Verify the About page is displayed
Verify the brand story content is displayed

title: See the boutique transition overlay during navigation
description: This verifies that client-side navigation shows the custom loading overlay before the destination page appears.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click the link to view the blog page
Verify a boutique-themed loading overlay is displayed during the transition
Verify the blog page is displayed

title: Return to the top of a long page
description: This verifies that a visitor can use the floating control to return smoothly to the top after scrolling down a long page.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Scroll down the page past the scroll threshold
Verify the scroll to top control is displayed
Click the scroll to top control
Verify the page returns to the top

title: Discover a blog article from the listing
description: This verifies that a reader can open the blog listing, choose an article, and reach the article detail view to read it.

steps.description: Navigate to /blog
Click an article from the listing
Verify the article detail page is displayed
Verify article content is displayed

title: Explore blog posts and return to the top
description: A site visitor can open the blog, read an article, and use the scroll-to-top control to return to the top of the page.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click the link to open the blog
Open a blog article
Scroll down the article page
Click the scroll-to-top control
Verify the blog article page is displayed at the top
Verify the blog content remains visible

title: Read the blog and use scroll to top
description: This verifies that a reader can browse a blog article and then use the floating control to quickly return to the top of the page.

steps.description: Navigate to /blog
Click an article from the listing
Scroll down the article page past the scroll threshold
Verify the scroll to top control is displayed
Click the scroll to top control
Verify the page returns to the top

title: Read the About page brand story
description: A visitor can open the About page and read the boutique brand story and craft-focused identity information.

steps.description: Navigate to /about
Verify the About page is displayed
Verify the brand story content is displayed

title: Access the admin dashboard after sign in
description: This verifies that a signed-in admin can submit valid credentials on the login page and reach the protected admin dashboard.

steps.description: Navigate to /admin/login
Fill in the admin email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the admin password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the admin login form
Verify the admin dashboard is displayed

title: Access the protected admin area after login
description: An authenticated admin can sign in through the admin login page and reach the protected admin dashboard.

steps.description: Navigate to /admin/login
Fill in the username field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the admin login form
Verify the admin dashboard is displayed
Verify protected admin content is visible

title: Show the admin login page on protected access attempt
description: A visitor attempting to open the protected admin area is routed to the admin login page rather than the dashboard.

steps.description: Navigate to /admin
Verify the admin login page is displayed
Verify the protected admin dashboard is not visible

title: Reach the admin login page
description: This verifies that a potential admin can open the admin sign-in entry point from the public site.

steps.description: Navigate to /admin/login
Verify the admin login form is displayed

title: Access the admin login entry point
description: A potential admin can open the admin login page from the public site and view the login entry form.

steps.description: Navigate to /admin/login
Verify the admin login page is displayed
Verify the admin login form is displayed

title: Reject empty checkout submission
description: A customer cannot submit the checkout form without required information and sees validation feedback instead of a successful submission.

steps.description: Navigate to /checkout
Submit the checkout form without entering required information
Verify checkout validation errors are visible
Verify no confirmation is shown

title: Reject empty contact submission
description: A visitor cannot submit the contact form without required information and sees validation feedback instead of a sent confirmation.

steps.description: Navigate to /contact
Submit the contact form without entering required information
Verify contact validation errors are visible
Verify no message sent confirmation is shown
